visual_identity.base_silhouette: small pebble-like body with short stick arms

core_role.description: A generic abstract operator that participates in the main visual action.
core_role.forbidden_role: decorative mascot, branded IP, or background ornament

action_library.description: Carry raw material into the visual mechanism.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The pebble operator carries raw material toward the main mechanism.

action_library.description: Pull a rope, handle, or simple lever.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The pebble operator pulls a simple rope connected to the workflow.

action_library.description: Sort notes, blocks, or tokens into piles.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The pebble operator sorts small notes into clear piles.

action_library.description: Point at the central comparison or transition.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The pebble operator points at the key difference between two stations.

action_library.description: Repair a pipe or low-tech machine.
action_library.prompt_snippet: The pebble operator repairs a small low-tech machine.

deformation_rules.description: The pebble body becomes a simple funnel while remaining recognizable.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Conditionally deform the pebble operator into a simple funnel-like body while keeping the tiny dot eyes and stick arms.

deformation_rules.description: The operator is gently wedged in a pipe-shaped bottleneck.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the pebble operator lightly wedged inside a pipe-shaped bottleneck, still recognizable.

deformation_rules.description: The pebble operator is flattened like a note under overload.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the pebble operator mildly flattened like a note, still recognizable.
